message:
feat: session persistence — pane state snapshots and topology serializer

- Add session_pane_state.rs: per-pane terminal state capture with env
  redaction, safe-list filtering, 64KB size budgeting, and builder API
- Add session_topology.rs: mux topology serializer with split-tree
  inference algorithm (HSplit/VSplit detection, complex grid handling,
  pane matching for restore via cwd/title scoring)
- Add pane_state.rs: basic PaneStateSnapshot struct
- Fix tab.rs: complete wezterm_term → frankenterm_term import rename

Implements wa-2l27x.2 (topology serializer) and wa-2l27x.3 (terminal
state snapshot serializer) from the session persistence epic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
